Title: Outlander
Actors: Caitríona Balfe, Sam Heughan, Sophie Skelton
Plot: Follows the story of Claire Randall, a married combat nurse from 1945 who is mysteriously swept back in time to 1743, where she is immediately thrown into an unknown world in which her life is threatened. When she is forced to marry Jamie Fraser, a chivalrous and romantic young Scottish warrior, a passionate relationship is ignited that tears Claire's heart between two vastly different men in two irreconcilable lives.
Awards: Nominated for 4 Primetime Emmys. 37 wins & 96 nominations total
